title: What is the maximum number of insert objects for adding a block?
excerpt: Hi there. I’ve noticed that I get a 500 response from the server if I try to add 128 insert objects to the deltaFormat array for the content argument for a create_doc_block mutation. I’m guessing there’s an undocumented …

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there. I’ve noticed that I get a 500 response from the server if I try to add 128 insert objects to the deltaFormat array for the content argument for a create_doc_block mutation. I’m guessing there’s an undocumented limit?
